/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/llama-quantize.dir/quantize.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-quantize  -Wl,-rpath,"/Users/AqibMumtaz/Aqib Mumtaz/BitLogix/qwen-asr-local/qwen3-asr-local/llama.cpp/build/bin" ../../bin/libllama-common.0.0.7.dylib ../../bin/libllama.0.0.7.dylib ../../bin/libggml.0.11.0.dylib ../../bin/libggml-cpu.0.11.0.dylib ../../bin/libggml-blas.0.11.0.dylib ../../bin/libggml-base.0.11.0.dylib ../../common/libllama-common-base.a
